title: Neon Haze
description: An abstract, minimalist aesthetic featuring glowing neon gradients, simplified geometric forms, and a dreamy, nostalgic ambiance.
conceptPrompts: [Subject: GLITCH]. A high-fidelity abstract aesthetic. Theme: Neon Haze. Aesthetic Context: An abstract, minimalist aesthetic featuring glowing neon gradients, simplified geometric forms, and a dreamy, nostalgic ambiance.. Parameters: flat dimension, soft lighting, none texture, minimal complexity, loose level of detail. Primary color: #FC5C7D.
